title: oldenlandia tenelliflora
intro: Oldenlandia tenelliflora, also known as Xiao Chai Hu, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Oldenlandia tenelliflora include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Oldenlandia tenelliflora can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
